targets.queryText: SELECT market_value AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT market_value AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT margin_loan_balance AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT margin_loan_balance AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT ltv_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ltv_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT margin_call_buffer_usd AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT margin_call_buffer_usd AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT UPPER(margin_call_buffer_status) AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT UPPER(margin_call_buffer_status) AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT ltv_stress_10pct_drop AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ltv_stress_10pct_drop AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT ltv_stress_20pct_drop AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ltv_stress_20pct_drop AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT margin_monthly_interest AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT margin_monthly_interest AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, ltv_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-90 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, ltv_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-90 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;

targets.queryText: SELECT '-10%' AS scenario, ROUND(ltv_stress_10pct_drop, 1) AS new_ltv_pct, ROUND(market_value * 0.9 - margin_loan_balance, 0) AS buffer_usd UNION ALL SELECT '-20%', ROUND(ltv_stress_20pct_drop, 1), ROUND(market_value * 0.8 - margin_loan_balance, 0) UNION ALL SELECT '-30%', ROUND(ltv_stress_30pct_drop, 1), ROUND(market_value * 0.7 - margin_loan_balance, 0) FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT '-10%' AS scenario, ROUND(ltv_stress_10pct_drop, 1) AS new_ltv_pct, ROUND(market_value * 0.9 - margin_loan_balance, 0) AS buffer_usd UNION ALL SELECT '-20%', ROUND(ltv_stress_20pct_drop, 1), ROUND(market_value * 0.8 - margin_loan_balance, 0) UNION ALL SELECT '-30%', ROUND(ltv_stress_30pct_drop, 1), ROUND(market_value * 0.7 - margin_loan_balance, 0) FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
